name: zoo-ids
description: Generate predictable and unique identifiers composed of adjectives and animal names

scripts.example: npm run prepare && node -e "const { generateId } = require('./dist/index.js'); const a = generateId(); const b = generateId('my-seed'); const c = generateId('my-seed'); const d = generateId({ userId: 42 }, { numAdjectives: 3, delimiter: '-', caseStyle: 'lowercase' }); console.log('randomId:', a); console.log('deterministicA:', b); console.log('deterministicB:', c); console.log('same deterministic seed:', b === c); console.log('customId:', d);"

author: Bryan Lee
